name: Classic White Halo
description: A timeless minimalist rotating ring with a smooth fading opacity trailing arc.
css: .classic-halo { width: 32px; height: 32px; border: 3px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.15); border-top-color: #ffffff; border-radius: 50%; animation: spin-smooth 0.65s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1) infinite; } @keyframes spin-smooth { to { transform: rotate(360deg); } }

name: Quantum Echo Pulse
description: Concentric elegant white rings breathing out from a central focal point.
css: .quantum-pulse { position: relative; width: 40px; height: 40px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; } .quantum-pulse span { position: absolute; width: 100%; height: 100%; border: 2px solid #ffffff; border-radius: 50%; opacity: 0; animation: pulse-out 1.6s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1) infinite; } .quantum-pulse span:nth-child(2) { animation-delay: 0.8s; } @keyframes pulse-out { 0% { transform: scale(0.3); opacity: 1; } 100% { transform: scale(1.3); opacity: 0; } }

name: Infinite Orbit Dots
description: Three perfectly weighted crisp white dots tracking a smooth wave sequence.
css: .infinite-dots { display: flex; gap: 6px; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 24px; } .infinite-dots span { width: 8px; height: 8px; background: #ffffff; border-radius: 50%; animation: dot-wave 1.1s cubic-bezier(0.45, 0, 0.55, 1) infinite; } .infinite-dots span:nth-child(2) { animation-delay: 0.15s; } .infinite-dots span:nth-child(3) { animation-delay: 0.3s; } @keyframes dot-wave { 0%, 100% { transform: translateY(0); opacity: 0.3; } 50% { transform: translateY(-7px); opacity: 1; } }

name: Linear Stride Loader
description: A refined, ultra-thin sleek loading track with an infinite sliding segment.
css: .linear-stride { width: 110px; height: 3px; background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1); border-radius: 2px; overflow: hidden; position: relative; } .stride-fill { position: absolute; height: 100%; width: 40%; background: #ffffff; animation: stride-slide 1.4s cubic-bezier(0.65, 0.05, 0.36, 1) infinite; } @keyframes stride-slide { 0% { left: -45%; } 100% { left: 105%; } }

name: Monolith Isometric Flip
description: A minimalist white square rotating through crisp geometric 3D space.
css: .monolith-flip { width: 24px; height: 24px; background: #ffffff; animation: geometric-flip 1.3s cubic-bezier(0.76, 0, 0.24, 1) infinite; } @keyframes geometric-flip { 0% { transform: perspective(120px) rotateX(0deg) rotateY(0deg); } 50% { transform: perspective(120px) rotateX(-180.1deg) rotateY(0deg); } 100% { transform: perspective(120px) rotateX(-180.1deg) rotateY(-179.9deg); } }

name: Vintage Radar Beacon
description: A single solid pure white focal node fading dynamically to signify active tracking.
css: .radar-beacon { width: 16px; height: 16px; background: #ffffff; border-radius: 50%; box-shadow: 0 0 0 0 rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.5); animation: beacon-shimmer 1.2s cubic-bezier(0.25, 0, 0, 1) infinite; } @keyframes beacon-shimmer { 0% { transform: scale(0.85); box-shadow: 0 0 0 0 rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.6); } 70% { transform: scale(1); box-shadow: 0 0 0 12px rgba(255, 255, 255, 0); } 100% { transform: scale(0.85); box-shadow: 0 0 0 0 rgba(255, 255, 255, 0); } }

name: Total Eclipse Track
description: A split concentric circle design spinning in opposition for premium visual depth.
css: .eclipse-track { width: 34px; height: 34px; border: 2px solid transparent; border-top-color: #ffffff; border-bottom-color: #ffffff; border-radius: 50%; animation: eclipse-spin 0.8s cubic-bezier(0.45, 0.05, 0.55, 0.95) infinite; } @keyframes eclipse-spin { to { transform: rotate(360deg); } }

name: Duo Block Cascade
description: Two interlocking crisp geometric micro-blocks cycling positions on an angle.
css: .duo-cascade { width: 32px; height: 32px; position: relative; animation: duo-rotate 1.8s ease infinite; } .duo-cascade div { position: absolute; width: 12px; height: 12px; background: #ffffff; border-radius: 1px; top: 0; } .duo-cascade div:nth-child(1) { left: 0; animation: bounce-one 0.9s cubic-bezier(0.45, 0, 0.55, 1) infinite alternate; } .duo-cascade div:nth-child(2) { right: 0; animation: bounce-two 0.9s cubic-bezier(0.45, 0, 0.55, 1) infinite alternate; } @keyframes duo-rotate { to { transform: rotate(360deg); } } @keyframes bounce-one { 0% { transform: translateY(0); } 100% { transform: translateY(16px); } } @keyframes bounce-two { 0% { transform: translateY(16px); } 100% { transform: translateY(0); } }

name: Studio Helix Mesh
description: A highly premium sequence of 4 scaled dots expanding into a structured wave line.
css: .helix-mesh { display: flex; gap: 5px; align-items: center; } .helix-mesh span { width: 6px; height: 6px; background: #ffffff; border-radius: 50%; animation: helix-scale 1s ease-in-out infinite; } .helix-mesh span:nth-child(1) { animation-delay: -0.3s; } .helix-mesh span:nth-child(2) { animation-delay: -0.2s; } .helix-mesh span:nth-child(3) { animation-delay: -0.1s; } @keyframes helix-scale { 0%, 100% { transform: scale(0.6); opacity: 0.2; } 50% { transform: scale(1.2); opacity: 1; } }

name: Satellite Orbit Node
description: An ultra-thin track holding a single tiny white satellite dot circling seamlessly.
css: .satellite-ring { width: 36px; height: 36px; border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08); border-radius: 50%; position: relative; animation: sat-spin 1.1s linear infinite; } .sat-node { width: 6px; height: 6px; background: #ffffff; border-radius: 50%; position: absolute; top: -3px; left: calc(50% - 3px); } @keyframes sat-spin { to { transform: rotate(360deg); } }

name: Metro Dual Transit
description: Two opposing architectural geometric bars meeting back-to-back dynamically.
css: .metro-shuttle { width: 48px; height: 4px; background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.15); border-radius: 2px; overflow: hidden; position: relative; } .metro-shuttle div { position: absolute; width: 40%; height: 100%; background: #ffffff; animation: shuttle-move 1.1s ease-in-out infinite alternate; } @keyframes shuttle-move { 0% { left: 0%; width: 20%; } 50% { width: 50%; } 100% { left: 80%; width: 20%; } }

name: Apex Trinity Gate
description: Three clean modern points shifting paths in unified mechanical precision.
css: .apex-trinity { display: flex; width: 32px; height: 32px; position: relative; } .apex-trinity span { position: absolute; width: 8px; height: 8px; background: #ffffff; border-radius: 50%; animation: trinity-sweep 1.4s cubic-bezier(0.65, 0.05, 0.36, 1) infinite; } .apex-trinity span:nth-child(1) { top: 0; left: 12px; } .apex-trinity span:nth-child(2) { bottom: 0; left: 0; animation-delay: -0.46s; } .apex-trinity span:nth-child(3) { bottom: 0; right: 0; animation-delay: -0.92s; } @keyframes trinity-sweep { 0% { transform: rotate(0deg) translate(12px) rotate(0deg); } 100% { transform: rotate(360deg) translate(12px) rotate(-360deg); } }

name: Zenith Dashed Ring
description: A high-end segmented circular progress frame slicing elegantly through space.
css: .zenith-dash { width: 30px; height: 30px; border: 2px dashed rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2); border-top: 2px solid #ffffff; border-radius: 50%; animation: spin-smooth 0.9s linear infinite; }

name: Minimal Focus Reticle
description: Four symmetrical corner blocks pulsing uniformly like a classic camera shutter.
css: .focus-reticle { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); gap: 6px; width: 24px; height: 24px; } .focus-reticle div { width: 9px; height: 9px; border: 2px solid #ffffff; border-radius: 1px; animation: reticle-pulse 1.3s ease-in-out infinite; } .focus-reticle div:nth-child(1) { border-right: 0; border-bottom: 0; } .focus-reticle div:nth-child(2) { border-left: 0; border-bottom: 0; } .focus-reticle div:nth-child(3) { border-right: 0; border-top: 0; } .focus-reticle div:nth-child(4) { border-left: 0; border-top: 0; } @keyframes reticle-pulse { 0%, 100% { transform: scale(0.9); opacity: 0.4; } 50% { transform: scale(1.1); opacity: 1; } }

name: Fluid Elastic Bloom
description: A continuous modern looping element flexing structural mass as it tracks circles.
css: .fluid-bloom { width: 28px; height: 28px; background: transparent; border: 3px solid #ffffff; border-radius: 42% 58% 70% 30% / 45% 45% 55% 55%; animation: bloom-flex 2s linear infinite; } @keyframes bloom-flex { 0% { transform: rotate(0deg); border-radius: 42% 58% 70% 30% / 45% 45% 55% 55%; } 50% { border-radius: 70% 30% 52% 48% / 60% 40% 60% 40%; } 100% { transform: rotate(360deg); border-radius: 42% 58% 70% 30% / 45% 45% 55% 55%; } }

name: Studio Signal Wave
description: Three vertical columns scaling symmetrically to outline real-time active response.
css: .signal-wave { display: flex; gap: 4px; align-items: center; height: 24px; } .signal-wave span { width: 3px; height: 12px; background: #ffffff; animation: wave-stretch 0.8s ease-in-out infinite alternate; } .signal-wave span:nth-child(2) { animation-delay: 0.25s; } .signal-wave span:nth-child(3) { animation-delay: 0.5s; } @keyframes wave-stretch { 0% { height: 6px; opacity: 0.3; } 100% { height: 20px; opacity: 1; } }

name: Vortex Gradient Sweep
description: An ultra-smooth translucent trailing sweep with a definitive stark white head block.
css: .vortex-ring { width: 32px; height: 32px; border: 3px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1); border-left-color: #ffffff; border-radius: 50%; animation: spin-smooth 0.55s linear infinite; }

name: Stellar Cross Matrix
description: Four minimalist micro-blocks processing on an interlocking axis.
css: .stellar-cross { width: 28px; height: 28px; position: relative; } .stellar-cross div { position: absolute; width: 6px; height: 6px; background: #ffffff; border-radius: 50%; animation: cross-collapse 1.2s cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1) infinite; } .stellar-cross div:nth-child(1) { top: 0; left: 11px; animation-delay: 0s; } .stellar-cross div:nth-child(2) { right: 0; top: 11px; animation-delay: 0.15s; } .stellar-cross div:nth-child(3) { bottom: 0; left: 11px; animation-delay: 0.3s; } .stellar-cross div:nth-child(4) { left: 0; top: 11px; animation-delay: 0.45s; } @keyframes cross-collapse { 0%, 100% { transform: scale(0.5); opacity: 0.2; } 50% { transform: scale(1.2); opacity: 1; } }

name: Hourglass Modern Pivot
description: Two sleek back-to-back structural triangles rotating cleanly at an axial center.
css: .hourglass-pivot { width: 0; height: 0; border-left: 12px solid transparent; border-right: 12px solid transparent; border-top: 12px solid #ffffff; border-bottom: 12px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2); animation: pivot-flip 1.4s cubic-bezier(0.77, 0, 0.175, 1) infinite; } @keyframes pivot-flip { 0% { transform: rotate(0deg); } 50% { transform: rotate(180deg); } 100% { transform: rotate(360deg); } }

name: Velocity Accent Arc
description: A rapid modern tracking curve with variable speed dynamics built directly into the keyframe.
css: .velocity-sweep { width: 30px; height: 30px; border: 2px solid transparent; border-left-color: #ffffff; border-radius: 50%; animation: spin-smooth 0.45s linear infinite; }

name: Isotope Core Orbit
description: A floating internal white node surrounded by a fluid orbital tracking shield.
css: .isotope-core { width: 36px; height: 36px; border: 2px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.15); border-top-color: #ffffff; border-radius: 50%; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; animation: spin-smooth 0.9s cubic-bezier(0.5, 0.1, 0.5, 0.9) infinite; } .core-center { width: 8px; height: 8px; background: #ffffff; border-radius: 50%; opacity: 0.7; animation: core-pulse 0.9s ease-in-out infinite alternate; } @keyframes core-pulse { from { transform: scale(0.8); } to { transform: scale(1.1); } }

name: Sentinel Static Ring
description: A heavy, solid minimalist split-ring looping on a highly structured cadence.
css: .sentinel-line { width: 28px; height: 28px; border: 4px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1); border-left-color: #ffffff; border-radius: 50%; animation: spin-smooth 0.7s cubic-bezier(0.3, 0.6, 0.7, 0.3) infinite; }

name: Prism Matrix Scale
description: Three sequential square blocks expanding outwards cleanly in an assembly layout.
css: .prism-matrix { display: flex; gap: 4px; } .prism-matrix div { width: 10px; height: 10px; background: #ffffff; border-radius: 1px; animation: prism-grow 1s ease-in-out infinite; } .prism-matrix div:nth-child(1) { animation-delay: 0s; } .prism-matrix div:nth-child(2) { animation-delay: 0.15s; } .prism-matrix div:nth-child(3) { animation-delay: 0.3s; } @keyframes prism-grow { 0%, 100% { transform: scale(0.5); opacity: 0.2; } 50% { transform: scale(1); opacity: 1; } }

name: Fractional Precision Arc
description: A micro single-quadrant sharp line offering absolute minimal structural layout drag.
css: .arc-fraction { width: 26px; height: 26px; border: 2px solid transparent; border-top-color: #ffffff; border-radius: 50%; animation: spin-smooth 0.5s linear infinite; }

name: Prime Terminal Cursor
description: A retro-inspired premium terminal block pulsing rhythmically like a system prompt.
css: .prime-terminal { width: 14px; height: 22px; background: #ffffff; animation: terminal-blink 0.9s steps(2, start) infinite; } @keyframes terminal-blink { to { opacity: 0; } }
